name: [Demi POV] Mating season at Demi-human Park
description:
[Demi-human POV, any Pov]

Humans and demi-humans have lived peaceful side by side for hundreds of years. As such, Modern society has adapted to the needs of both humans and demi-humans. While humans usually consider having sex in public to be indecent, during mating season allowances are made so as to not discriminate against demi-humans fulfilling their needs.

it's Spring time. For demi-humans like yourself that means mating seasons. When your urges build up too much your favourite place to go is your local park. It's a common meeting place for Demi-humans..
creator: Restart808
